intentSynonyms: fetch a single spaces in clickup
view one specific spaces in clickup
list spaces in a workspace in clickup
description: List all spaces in a ClickUp workspace. Spaces are top-level containers for organizing work. Returns space name, color, privacy, and archive status. By default excludes archived spaces.

workspace_id.description: Workspace ID. Defaults to the current workspace.

include_archived.description: Whether to include archived spaces (default: false)
